{"image_id":"img_1","path":"images/sample/case_008/img_1.jpg","actual_object":"car","visible_parts":["body","door","fender","front_bumper","headlight","hood","side_mirror","windshield"],"visible_issue_types":["broken_part","dent","scratch"],"severity":"high","target_part_visibility":"visible","requirement_results":[{"requirement_id":"REQ_GENERAL_OBJECT_PART","status":"not_met","reason":"The car and hood are visible, but the hood is open and mostly seen from the underside/edge, so the claimed top-surface scratch cannot be clearly inspected."},{"requirement_id":"REQ_CAR_BODY_PANEL","status":"not_met","reason":"The claimed hood panel is not shown from an angle that allows reliable assessment of surface marks across the top panel."},{"requirement_id":"REQ_REVIEW_TRUST","status":"not_met","reason":"The image is relevant to a car but has repeated visible stock-style watermark text and does not clearly show the claimed hood scratch condition."}],"fact_summary":"The image shows the front of a car with the hood raised. The front end, including bumper area, headlights, fenders/body, windshield, door, and side mirror, is visible. There is severe visible front-end damage with broken or missing front components, deformation, and scrape-like markings on exposed front/body areas. The claimed hood is visible, but its top surface is not clearly inspectable for a scratch due to the open angle and shadows.","risk_flags":["claim_mismatch","damage_not_visible","low_light_or_glare","non_original_image","wrong_angle"],"reviewable":false,"claim_target_clear":true,"diagnostics":["Repeated 'Vecteezy' watermark text is visible across the image.","The visible text appears to be watermark/stock-photo text rather than an instruction-like message.","The hood top surface where the claimed scratch would be assessed is not clearly visible."]}
